_note: GLM5 c=64 held-out eval window. gorgo-static uses calibrated prefill/load weights (ms/tok) and a tunable rtt_weight. Pair with manifest_glm5_apr2_0030_0100.json (same time-of-day as tuning, different day -- tests generalization).

policies._note: STALE: prefill_rate is from v8 tuning in the old s/tok unit; recalibrate to get the ms/tok value (typical L40S prefill ~0.2 ms/tok), then re-tune rtt_weight only. The load/contention term was removed from the cost model.
policies.name: gorgo
policies.label: gorgo-static
